node.statement: N6 (FORWARD closeness, EXPLICIT universal C). Compute P-Q: P=(1/2)(I+SR), and Q=(1/2)(I+S) since S=2Q-I => Q=(1/2)(I+S). So P-Q=(1/2)(I+SR)-(1/2)(I+S)=(1/2)(SR-S)=(1/2)S(R-I). By N1 submultiplicativity and N2 (||S||<=3), N3 (||R-I||<=4 C_1(eta_0) eta): ||P-Q||<=(1/2)||S|| ||R-I||<=(1/2)(3)(4 C_1(eta_0) eta)=6 C_1(eta_0) eta. Define the EXPLICIT universal constant C:=6 C_1(eta_0) (HONEST FLAG 1: C is DERIVED, C_1(eta_0)=sum_{n>=1}|C(-1/2,n)|(4eta_0)^{n-1}<infinity from N3, depending only on the fixed regime parameter eta_0<1/4, dimension-free in n). Hence ||P-Q||<=C eta. [N1; N2; N3; N5]
